error_signature: unable to retrieve Google Docs ID
title: Retrieving Google Docs ID from Google Drive node
symptom: Users are unable to find the Google Docs ID after uploading a document to Google Drive using n8n.
not_this_if: ID is visible in the Google Drive node output
root_cause: The Google Drive node outputs various fields after an upload, but users may not know to look for the 'id' field specifically, leading to confusion about how to retrieve the document ID.
fix_steps: After uploading a document, check the output of the Google Drive node.
Locate the 'id' field in the output JSON.
Use the expression {{$node['Google Drive'].json['id']}} to access the ID.
agent_instruction: Check the Google Drive node output for the 'id' field after uploading a document.
